title: better Crossbar (crosshair+hotbar)
description: Level up your HUD! Clean hotbar, numbered slots, sharp crosshair.
body:
**Enhance your Minecraft experience with the Hotbar Overhaul resource pack! This pack refines and improves key UI elements, making your gameplay smoother and more intuitive. Here’s what it brings to the table.**
## Features

1. Custom Hotbar Background: A sleek, minimalistic design for the hotbar that removes distractions and lets you focus on your inventory items. With a clear and organized background, you'll always know exactly what you need to press.

2. Slot Numbers: Every hotbar slot is clearly numbered, making it easier to quickly identify and select items. No more guessing or fumbling through your inventory!

3. Cleaned-Up XP Bar: The XP bar is tidied up, removing any clutter while keeping the essentials visible. Stay informed without unnecessary visual distractions.

4. Enhanced Armor Bar: The armor bar is visually upgraded for a cleaner and more polished look, ensuring you can easily track your armor's durability at a glance.

5. Improved Crosshair: The crosshair gets a more refined design, improving aiming precision without being too distracting. Perfect for both casual and competitive players alike.

This resource pack is perfect for anyone who wants a more streamlined and visually appealing interface without sacrificing functionality. Install it today for a cleaner, more efficient Minecraft UI! 

1.8 version coming soon!
